commands_run: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/cell-log-store.fk form-stdlib/storage-port.fk form-stdlib/storage-port-file.fk form-stdlib/graph-node-port.fk form-stdlib/tests/graph-node-port-band.fk
cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_graph_node_form_port.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py tests/test_commit_evidence_validator.py
cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_graph_node_form_port.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py
failure_reason: Exposed graph-node functions as a Form-native storage-port layer. Added gn-put-node, gn-get-node, gn-node-exists?, gn-count-nodes, gn-list-node-ids, and gn-list-nodes with type metadata, typed indexes, typed counts, update stability, and retype count movement. The proof band returned 11111 across memory and durable file carriers, including reopen persistence. Updated the ideas-router gap now that graph-node read shape exists; native HTTP schema projection remains the next follow-up.
